emails.subject_base: Signatory Authority for Net Works and EnronOnline
emails.body: I will prepare Unanimous Consent electing Robert Jones. What do we want to use as effective date? Please advise. Thanks, Deb Deb Korkmas Enron North America Corp. ENA Legal Dept. 1400 Smith Street, Room 3819 Houston, TX 77002 Phone: 713-853-5448 Fax: 713-646-3393 Tana Jones 11/09/2000 01:09 PM
